notes: Prevailing WNW; westerlies year-round, more northwesterly in summer.
Lighter winds under forest cover; prevailing W.
Strong, persistent westerlies; among the windiest parts of Canada.
WSW chinook winds; frequent strong gusts off the mountains.
Prevailing W; sheltered river valleys vary locally.
Prevailing WNW–NW; strong southeasterlies common in summer. Regina/Saskatoon plains — plan windbreaks against the cold NW winter wind.
Strong, persistent westerlies; among the windiest parts of Canada (Swift Current).
Lighter winds with more shelter; prevailing WNW. Battleford / Prince Albert.
